member.name: T:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.Policy.IPolicyEvaluaвr
member.summary: Базовый класс для обработчиков авторизации, которые должны вызываться для определенного типа требований.

members.member:
Выполняет аутентификацию для и устанавливает результирующий в . Если схемы не заданы, операция не выполняется.
. . <возвращает> если только все схемы, указанные fail в authenticate. </возвращает>

Пытается выполнить авторизацию для политики с помощью .
. The result of a call в . .
Необязательный ресурс, с которым должна быть проверена политика. Если ресурс не требуется для оценки политики, можно передать null в качестве значения.
<возвращает>Возвращает если авторизация успешна. В противном случае возвращает если , otherwise возвращает </возвращает>

member.name: T:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.Policy.PolicyAuthorizationResult
member.summary: The result of .

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.Policy.PolicyAuthorizationResult.Challenged
member.summary: If true, means the callee should challenge and try again.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.Policy.PolicyAuthorizationResult.Forbidden
member.summary: Authorization was forbidden.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.Policy.PolicyAuthorizationResult.Succeeded
member.summary: Authorization was successful.

member.name: P:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authorization.Policy.PolicyAuthorizationResult.AuthorizationFailure
member.summary: Contains information about why authorization failed.

members.member:
Indicates that an unauthenticated user requested access в an endpoint that requires authentication.
<возвращает> .</возвращает>

Indicates that the access в a resource was forbidden.
<возвращает> .</возвращает>

Indicates that the access в a resource was forbidden.
Specеслиies the reason the authorization failed.s <возвращает> .</возвращает>

member.param: The next middleware in the application pipeline. Implementations may not invoke this если the authorization did not succeed.

member.name: T:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.AuthorizationAppBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods в add authorization capabilities в an HTTP application pipeline.

members.member:
Adds the в the specеслиied , which enables authorization capabilities.
When authorizing a resource that is routed using endpoint routing, this call must appear between the calls в app.UseRouting() and app.UseEndpoints(...) for the middleware в function correctly.
в add the middleware в. <возвращает>A reference в after the operation has completed.</возвращает>

member.name: T:Microsoft.AspNetCore.Builder.AuthorizationEndpointConventionBuilderExtensions
member.summary: Authorization extension methods for .

members.member:
Adds the default authorization policy в the endpoint(s).
The endpoint convention builder. <возвращает>The original convention builder parameter.</возвращает>

Adds authorization policies with the specеслиied names в the endpoint(s).
The endpoint convention builder. A collection of policy names. If empty, the default authorization policy will be used. <возвращает>The original convention builder parameter.</возвращает>

Adds authorization policies with the specеслиied в the endpoint(s).
The endpoint convention builder.
A collection of . If empty, the default authorization policy will be used.
<возвращает>The original convention builder parameter.</возвращает>

Adds an authorization policy в the endpoint(s).
The endpoint convention builder. policy. <возвращает>The original convention builder parameter.</возвращает>

Adds an new authorization policy configured by a callback в the endpoint(s).
The endpoint convention builder. The callback used в configure the policy. <возвращает>The original convention builder parameter.</возвращает>

Allows anonymous access в the endpoint by adding в the endpoint metadata. This will bypass all authorization checks for the endpoint including the default authorization policy and fallback authorization policy.
The endpoint convention builder. <возвращает>The original convention builder parameter.</возвращает>

member.summary: Helper code used when implementing authentication middleware

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Internal.SecurityHelper.MergeUserPrincipal(System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal,System.Security.Claims.ClaimsPrincipal)
member.summary: Add all ClaimsIdentities from an additional ClaimPrincipal в the ClaimsPrincipal Merges a new claims principal, placing all new identities first, and eliminating any empty unauthenticated identities from context.User
